ed_note: Adult with tennis elbow. Chronic elbow overuse injury. X-ray performed and negative. Neurovascular intact including hand motor. No acute trauma. No elbow instability concern. No hand weakness.

Adult with elbow overuse strain. Xray performed and negative. Neurovascular intact including hand motor. No acute trauma. No instability concern. No posterior elbow swelling.

Adult with tennis elbow. Chronic elbow overuse injury. Xray performed and negative. Motor in the hand is normal. No acute trauma. No instability concern.
Adult with elbow overuse strain. Xray performed and negative. Neurovascular intact including hand motor. No acute trauma. No instability concern. Unable to pronate.
Adult with elbow overuse strain. Xray performed and negative. Neurovascular intact including hand motor. No acute trauma. No instability concern. Weakness pronating forearm.
Adult with tennis elbow. Chronic elbow overuse injury. X-ray performed and negative. Neurovascular intact including hand motor. No acute trauma. No elbow instability concern. Takes apixaban.
